commands.title: Send Line or Selection to Macaulay2 Webview
Send Line or Selection to Macaulay2 Terminal

macaulay2.executablePath.description: Optional override for the Macaulay2 executable. Leave empty to auto-detect it.

macaulay2.launchArgs.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to M2 when starting REPL sessions.
macaulay2.launchArgs.markdownDescription: Additional command-line arguments passed to M2 when starting REPL sessions, for example `--print-width 50`. Note: Some display changes commands will not affect the webview REPL.

macaulay2.executablePathAlternatives.description: Additional Macaulay2 executables to show in the executable switcher. The active executablePath and auto-detect option are always included.

macaulay2.showExecutableSwitcher.description: Show a status bar button for quickly switching the Macaulay2 executable.

enumDescriptions: Use the original Macaulay2 webview colors.
Use a neutral light color theme.
Follow the active VS Code editor colors where available.
macaulay2.webviewColorTheme.description: Controls the color theme used by the Macaulay2 webview REPL.

enumDescriptions: Start the webview REPL in Macaulay2 WebApp output mode.
Start the webview REPL with `topLevelMode = Standard`.
macaulay2.webviewTopLevelMode.description: Controls the top-level output mode used by the Macaulay2 webview REPL.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Macaulay2
walkthroughs.description: Start a Macaulay2 REPL, send code from `.m2` files, and configure the extension.

steps.title: Start a REPL
steps.description:
Open a Macaulay2 REPL in either the webview or a terminal.

[Start M2 REPL](command:macaulay2.startREPL)

[Start M2 Terminal](command:macaulay2.startTerminal)

If the extension failed to find your Macaulay2 executable automatically, you can configure the path here: 

[Select M2 Executable](command:macaulay2.selectExecutablePath)

steps.title: Send Code
steps.description:
Send selected code to the webview REPL with `Shift+Enter` or to the terminal REPL with `Ctrl+Enter`.

[Open Example File](command:macaulay2.openGettingStartedExample)

steps.title: Configure Extension
steps.description:
You can change the start up behavior, visual theme, and other settings in the settings.

[Open Macaulay2 Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22%40ext%3AM2.macaulay2%22%5D)

All keybindings can be viewed and edited.

[Open Macaulay2 Keyboard Shortcuts](command:workbench.action.openGlobalKeybindings?%5B%22%40ext%3Am2.macaulay2%22%5D)

scripts.test: rimraf out/test && npm run compile && vscode-test
